mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN DLVRY_STAT_CD = 'READY' THEN 1 END) AS READY_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN DLVRY_STAT_CD = 'SHIPPING' THEN 1 END) AS SHIPPING_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN DLVRY_STAT_CD = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS DELIVERED_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN DLVRY_STAT_CD = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 END) AS CANCELED_COUNT FROM ORDER_SHIPPING

SELECT os.SHIPPING_SN, os.ORD_SN, o.ORD_ID, o.ORD_NM, os.BUYER_NM, os.BUYER_TEL, os.BUYER_EMAIL, os.RECEIVER_NM, os.RECEIVER_TEL, os.RECEIVER_TEL2, os.ZIP_CD, os.ADDR_ROAD, os.ADDR_JIBUN, os.ADDR_DTL, os.DELIVERY_MSG, os.DLVRY_STAT_CD, os.INVOICE_NO, os.RGTR_ID, os.REG_DT, os.LAST_MDFR_ID, os.MDFCN_DT FROM ORDER_SHIPPING os JOIN ORDERS o ON os.ORD_SN = o.ORD_SN
ORDER BY os.REG_DT
ASC DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDER_SHIPPING os JOIN ORDERS o ON os.ORD_SN = o.ORD_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDER_SHIPPING ( ORD_SN, BUYER_NM, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_EMAIL, RECEIVER_NM, RECEIVER_TEL, RECEIVER_TEL2, ZIP_CD, ADDR_ROAD, ADDR_JIBUN, ADDR_DTL, DELIVERY_MSG, DLVRY_STAT_CD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID ) VALUES ( #{ordSn}, #{buyerNm}, #{buyerTel}, #{buyerEmail}, #{receiverNm}, #{receiverTel}, #{receiverTel2}, #{zipCd}, #{addrRoad}, #{addrJibun}, #{addrDtl}, #{deliveryMsg}, COALESCE(#{dlvryStatCd}, 'READY'), #{rgtrId}, #{rgtrId} )
mapper.select: SELECT os.SHIPPING_SN, os.ORD_SN, os.BUYER_NM, os.BUYER_TEL, os.BUYER_EMAIL, os.RECEIVER_NM, os.RECEIVER_TEL, os.RECEIVER_TEL2, os.ZIP_CD, os.ADDR_ROAD, os.ADDR_JIBUN, os.ADDR_DTL, os.DELIVERY_MSG, os.DLVRY_STAT_CD, os.INVOICE_NO, os.RGTR_ID, os.REG_DT, os.LAST_MDFR_ID, os.MDFCN_DT FROM ORDER_SHIPPING os WHERE os.ORD_SN = #{ordSn}

SELECT os.SHIPPING_SN, os.ORD_SN, os.BUYER_NM, os.BUYER_TEL, os.BUYER_EMAIL, os.RECEIVER_NM, os.RECEIVER_TEL, os.RECEIVER_TEL2, os.ZIP_CD, os.ADDR_ROAD, os.ADDR_JIBUN, os.ADDR_DTL, os.DELIVERY_MSG, os.DLVRY_STAT_CD, os.INVOICE_NO, os.RGTR_ID, os.REG_DT, os.LAST_MDFR_ID, os.MDFCN_DT FROM ORDER_SHIPPING os JOIN ORDERS o ON os.ORD_SN = o.ORD_SN WHERE os.ORD_SN = #{ordSn} AND o.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDER_SHIPPING SET RECEIVER_NM = #{receiverNm}, RECEIVER_TEL = #{receiverTel}, RECEIVER_TEL2 = #{receiverTel2}, ZIP_CD = #{zipCd}, ADDR_ROAD = #{addrRoad}, ADDR_JIBUN = #{addrJibun}, ADDR_DTL = #{addrDtl}, DELIVERY_MSG = #{deliveryMsg}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn} AND DLVRY_STAT_CD = 'READY'
UPDATE ORDER_SHIPPING SET DLVRY_STAT_CD = #{dlvryStatCd}, INVOICE_NO = #{invoiceNo}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn}
